description: Trend watchdog: flags verifier checks whose retained history flips pass/fail or whose runtime drifts steadily upward, so a flaky or degrading green is not trusted.

params.window: Number of most-recent results to analyze per check (default 12).
params.flipThreshold: Minimum pass/fail flips to flag binary instability (default 2).
params.durationGrowthThreshold: Ratio of recent-mean to early-mean runtime above which a green check is flagged as slowing down (default 1.5).
params.durationMinMs: Recent-mean runtime floor below which drift is ignored as noise (default 2000).
params.durationMinSamples: Minimum duration-bearing samples required to claim a trend (default 4).
